pulse_items.title: Artemis II Crew Lands Safely, Recovery Images Go Viral
pulse_items.summary: NASA's Artemis II mission successfully returned to Earth today with all four astronauts safe. Images of the crew being recovered from the Pacific Ocean are trending across social media, sparking renewed excitement about lunar exploration.

pulse_items.title: Pragmata Pre-Load Chaos: Gamers Crash Servers
pulse_items.summary: Capcom's highly anticipated sci-fi game Pragmata opened pre-loading today, causing Reddit gaming communities to explode with discussion. Server issues emerged as millions attempted to download simultaneously.

pulse_items.title: Microsoft Unveils 'Agentic AI' at Azure Summit
pulse_items.summary: Microsoft announced breakthrough autonomous AI agents at their Azure Summit today. The new systems can independently complete complex tasks without human intervention, sparking both excitement and ethical debates.

pulse_items.title: 'Quantum Kitchen' Cooking Trend Takes Over TikTok
pulse_items.summary: A bizarre cooking trend called 'Quantum Kitchen' is exploding on TikTok, where creators use molecular gastronomy techniques to create visually stunning but impractical dishes. The #QuantumKitchen hashtag has 2M+ videos.

pulse_items.title: AI-Generated '90s Sitcom Parodies Going Viral
pulse_items.summary: AI-generated parodies of 90s sitcoms with modern celebrities are being DM-shared at unprecedented rates. The 'Friends but with K-pop stars' video has been shared 500k+ times in 24 hours.

pulse_items.title: Major Climate Bill Passes EU Parliament
pulse_items.summary: The European Parliament passed sweeping climate legislation today, setting aggressive 2035 carbon neutrality targets. The vote is trending globally as environmental activists celebrate while industry groups express concern.

pulse_items.title: K-Pop Group's Secret Wedding Leaks, Fans Divided
pulse_items.summary: A popular K-pop idol's secret wedding photos leaked today, causing massive discussion across fan communities. Some fans are supportive while others feel betrayed, creating intense emotional debates.

pulse_items.title: DeFi Protocol 'Nexus' Exploited for $40M
pulse_items.summary: The decentralized finance protocol Nexus was exploited today, resulting in approximately $40M in losses. Crypto communities on Discord are analyzing the smart contract vulnerability in real-time.

pulse_items.title: NBA Playoffs Controversial Call Goes Viral
pulse_items.summary: A controversial foul call in tonight's NBA playoff game is trending across sports media. The replay has been viewed 10M+ times as fans and analysts debate whether it was the correct decision.

pulse_items.title: 'How to Spot Deepfakes' Searches Spike 300%
pulse_items.summary: Google Trends shows a 300% spike in searches for 'how to spot deepfakes' today following several high-profile AI-generated video controversies. People are increasingly concerned about digital authenticity.

pulse_items.title: Four-Day Workweek Study Shows Positive Results
pulse_items.summary: A major UK study on the four-day workweek released results today showing increased productivity and employee satisfaction. The findings are sparking serious discussions about work-life balance reforms.

pulse_items.title: Rare 'Bioluminescent Bloom' Lights Up California Coast
pulse_items.summary: An unusually intense bioluminescent algal bloom is creating stunning blue waves along the Southern California coast tonight. Locals and tourists are sharing breathtaking photos and videos.

pulse_items.title: Ancient Roman Villa Discovered Under London Pub
pulse_items.summary: Archaeologists announced the discovery of a remarkably preserved Roman villa beneath a London pub today. The find includes intact mosaics and artifacts, rewriting understanding of Roman settlement patterns.

pulse_items.title: AI Therapist App Controversy Erupts on Threads
pulse_items.summary: A new AI-powered therapy app is facing criticism on Threads for potentially replacing human therapists. Mental health professionals and users are debating the ethics and effectiveness of AI in sensitive healthcare areas.

pulse_items.title: Vintage Tamagotchi Revival Sweeps Gen Z
pulse_items.summary: Original 90s Tamagotchi digital pets are experiencing a massive revival among Gen Z, with prices skyrocketing on resale platforms. The nostalgia trend has younger users discovering the classic handheld games.
